name: Andres M. Belaza
bio:
Data Scientist | NLP & Linguistics | Mobility Tech | PhD in Computational Physics & Econophysics

From modeling social dynamics in physics to building ML models, I’v always been fascinated by how systems communicate and evolve.

Former automotive/mobility Data Scientist. Now focused on NLP, responsible AI, and sustainable machine learning.

Passionate about ethical and green tech and Physics
